Document:
# Merchant
Merchants are the economic backbone of CrystallEdge. They buy and sell goods across every trading faction in the city — from potion shops to blacksmiths, from the butcher's guild to the guard's armory. A skilled merchant knows the price of everything and uses that knowledge to profit.
## Responsibilities
- Trade goods between factions and players - Identify price differences and arbitrage opportunities - Negotiate with other players as a middleman - Stock supplies that other jobs need
## Trading Access
Merchants have access to [bold]all trading factions[/bold] in the city. No other job has this breadth of market access. This makes the Merchant uniquely powerful for building wealth through commerce.
## Requirements
[bold]1 hour[/bold] of total playtime required. No trait restrictions.
## Tips
- Check prices across factions before buying anything - Other players will pay a premium for goods they cannot easily access themselves - Keep a pouch with coins so you don't drop them when hit - The [textlink="Economy" link="OE14Economy"] section covers trading mechanics in detail
